prompt_inputs.goal: carbohydrate loading for marathon training with high caloric intake

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals 3000+ calories with carbohydrate emphasis (55-60% of total calories)
Includes pre-training, during-training, and post-training meals with appropriate timing
Compact format with 4-6 meals/snacks throughout the day
Realistic, practical meals suitable for a single athlete
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-intensity endurance athlete (e.g., marathon runner) requiring 3000+ calories with specific carbohydrate-loading emphasis and timing around training sessions

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers 1 full day with 4-5 meals strategically timed around workout
Protein intake is 160-170g daily (approximately 1.9-2g per kg bodyweight)
Pre-workout and post-workout meals are clearly identified with appropriate macros for recovery
Plan is compact and concise (fits within 300 words)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (e.g., weightlifter) needing protein-focused macros with strategic meal timing around gym workouts and recovery windows

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers all 3 meals for one day with vegetarian and gluten-free options
Provides adequate protein intake (approximately 1.6-2.2g per kg body weight) to support muscle gain
All meals use affordable, budget-friendly ingredients with estimated daily cost under $12
Includes caloric and macronutrient breakdown suitable for a 72kg athlete with muscle-building goals
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for single athlete
scenario: Testing with a budget-conscious athlete with dietary restrictions (e.g., vegetarian, gluten-free) to ensure the meal plan is both nutritionally complete and cost-effective while accommodating constraints
